comment: The app was superb until the recent update where they completely changed the UI, which now sucks. The most inconvenient part? I've to tap in the typing space to be able to see a small little history symbol on the top left. And what happens when I click on it? They have categorised my history into languages, like wow. And I don't need the typing space to cover my whole screen. Who's the product/UX guy who thought this kind of revamp was a good idea? Keep these in beta and AB tests, not the main v
key sentence: The key words: recent update, UI, history, typing space
the function of activity: The activity facilitates translation and navigation:Search, menu, navigate, history, handwriting, options, text entry, paste, language swap, and settings management for user interaction and feedback.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'History', 'description': 'View translation history'}, {'name': 'Keyboard', 'description': 'Open virtual keyboard for text input'}, {'name': 'Enter text', 'description': 'Input text using the keyboard or other input methods'}, {'name': 'Paste', 'description': 'Insert copied text into the translation area'}, {'name': 'Swap languages', 'description': 'Switch the languages being translated'}, {'name': 'Select language', 'description': 'Choose the source or target language for translation'}, {'name': 'Handwriting input', 'description': 'Use handwriting recognition for text input'}, {'name': 'Undo', 'description': 'Reverse the last action performed'}, {'name': 'Space bar', 'description': 'Insert a space while using handwriting input'}, {'name': 'Backspace key', 'description': 'Delete the previous character or action'}, {'name': 'Show details', 'description': 'Display more information or options related to the translation'}]
